scripts.build: bash -c 'BUILDDIR=/tmp/designpick-build-$$; rm -rf "$BUILDDIR"; rsync -a --exclude="前端" --exclude=".next" --exclude="out" --exclude="node_modules/.cache" ./ "$BUILDDIR/"; cd "$BUILDDIR" && NEXT_PRIVATE_DISABLE_TURBOPACK=1 npx next build && cp -r out "$OLDPWD/out"; rm -rf "$BUILDDIR"'
